headline: Introducing Omnigent: A Meta-Harness to Combine, Control and Share Your Agents
subject: 🚨 AI Alert: 78 new launches — Bloomberg Tech, The Verge AI, The Guardian Tech
article_title: Introducing Omnigent: A Meta-Harness to Combine, Control and Share Your Agents

article_items.title: Introducing Omnigent: A Meta-Harness to Combine, Control and Share Your Agents
article_items.description: Omnigent is a new open source meta-harness that sits above coding tools like Claude Code, Codex, and custom agents, so you can compose, govern, and share AI agents from one place.
article_items.excerpt: Omnigent is a new open source meta-harness that sits above coding tools like Claude Code, Codex, and custom agents, so you can compose, govern, and share AI agents from one place.
article_items.summary: Partner Program Explore benefits, tiers and how to become a partner Partner Solutions Find custom industry and migration solutions Platform Overview A unified platform for data, analytics and AI Governance Unified governance for all data, analytics and AI assets Artificial Intelligence Build and deploy ML and GenAI applications Business Intelligence Intelligent analytics for real-world data Data Warehousing Serverless data warehouse for SQL analytics Data Engineering ETL and orchestration for batch and streaming. At Databricks, we adopted coding agents early across our 5000+ member engineering team and built thousands of agents for customers. And as agent builders, we’re on a treadmill to improve our agents by combining the latest harnesses, SDKs and models. We believe the next layer of abstraction is the meta-harness, the layer above every harness where composition, control, and collaboration live. The best results no longer come from a single model in a single harness: Harvey beat a frontier model on quality and cost by giving an open-source worker model a frontier.
article_items.what_happened: Partner Program Explore benefits, tiers and how to become a partner Partner Solutions Find custom industry and migration solutions Platform Overview A unified platform for data, analytics and AI Governance Unified governance for all data, analytics and AI assets Artificial Intelligence Build and deploy ML and GenAI applications Business Intelligence Intelligent analytics for real-world data Data Warehousing Serverless data warehouse for SQL analytics Data Engineering ETL and orchestration for batch and streaming.
article_items.why_matters: At Databricks, we adopted coding agents early across our 5000+ member engineering team and built thousands of agents for customers. And as agent builders, we’re on a treadmill to improve our agents by combining the latest harnesses, SDKs and models.
article_items.what_to_watch: We believe the next layer of abstraction is the meta-harness, the layer above every harness where composition, control, and collaboration live. The best results no longer come from a single model in a single harness: Harvey beat a frontier model on quality and cost by giving an open-source worker model a frontier.
key_points: Partner Program Explore benefits, tiers and how to become a partner Partner Solutions Find custom industry and migration solutions Platform Overview A unified platform for data, analytics and AI Governance Unified.

The best results no longer come from a single model in a single harness: Harvey beat a frontier model on quality and cost by giving an open-source worker model a frontier advisor it can call, Anthropic built its.
As users, we often have 4-5 agents open at once (coding agents, Gemini search, etc) and spend our time copy-pasting text between them and Docs, Slack, and other collaboration tools.
At Databricks, we use and build agents extensively, from coding with them at scale to shipping agent products like Genie.
Omnigent introduces a common interface above command-line agents and agent SDKs to let you easily combine and interchange them, and then focuses on the shared problems where a harness stops.
At Databricks, we adopted coding agents early across our 5000+ member engineering team and built thousands of agents for customers.
And as agent builders, we’re on a treadmill to improve our agents by combining the latest harnesses, SDKs and models.
Thus we built a common API that wraps both terminal-based coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Pi, etc) and SDKs (OpenAI Agents, Claude Agents SDK, etc).
Contextual security policies : Omingent’s security policies go beyond the simple “allow X / deny Y” of coding agents, to track dynamic state about each session and make smarter decisions.
Cloud execution : launch any agent on your own machine or on hosted sandbox providers like Modal and Daytona , for safe collaboration in a hermetic environment.
Omnigent is a new open source meta-harness that sits above coding tools like Claude Code, Codex, and custom agents, so you can compose, govern, and share AI agents from one place.

We’ve also made Omnigent easy to deploy on a wide range of infrastructure, including Fly.io, Railway, Modal and Daytona sandboxes, and many LLM providers, and we welcome patches for more integrations.

article_items.title: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam 'hundreds of thousands of victims' sued by Google | TechCrunch
article_items.description: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.

article_items.title: Anthropic blocks all customers' access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 - Engadget
article_items.description: Anthropic has suspended all access to its new AI models Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with a government order citing national security concerns.
